deploy.startCommand: cd portfolio_backend && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=portfolio_backend.settings python manage.py migrate && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=portfolio_backend.settings python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth.models import User; User.objects.filter(username='vaibh').delete(); User.objects.create_superuser('vaibh', 'vaibh@gmail.com', 'Vaibh@123')" && gunicorn portfolio_backend.wsgi
